glossgroup.domains: (topic concept) (topic concept glossentry) (topic concept glossgroup) a(props deliveryTarget) (topic equation-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic markup-d) (topic mathml-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic svg-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)
glossgroup.title: Glossary

othermeta.name: description
othermeta.content: Definitions for key terms used in markdown-validator documentation: front matter, rule, rule set, flag, operator, workflow, XPath, and more.

glossentry.domains: (topic concept) (topic concept glossentry) (topic concept glossgroup) a(props deliveryTarget) (topic equation-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic markup-d) (topic mathml-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic svg-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)
glossentry.glossdef: A validation rule that checks the content of the Markdown document below the front-matter block. Body rules use XPath expressions to query the rendered HTML. Contrast with header rule.

glossentry.domains: (topic concept) (topic concept glossentry) (topic concept glossgroup) a(props deliveryTarget) (topic equation-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic markup-d) (topic mathml-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic svg-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)
glossentry.glossdef: Continuous Integration / Continuous Delivery. An automated pipeline that builds, tests, and validates code and content on every pull request. markdown-validator runs as a step in a CI/CD pipeline to gate merges on validation results.

glossentry.domains: (topic concept) (topic concept glossentry) (topic concept glossgroup) a(props deliveryTarget) (topic equation-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic markup-d) (topic mathml-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic svg-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)
glossentry.glossdef: An integer returned by a command-line program when it finishes. markdown-validator exits with 0 when all Required rules pass and 1 when any Required rule fails. CI systems use exit codes to determine whether a step succeeded or failed.

glossentry.domains: (topic concept) (topic concept glossentry) (topic concept glossgroup) a(props deliveryTarget) (topic equation-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic markup-d) (topic mathml-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic svg-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)
glossentry.glossdef: A field in a validation rule that controls how the query result is processed before being compared to the expected value. Header flags include value, check, date, and pattern. Body flags include count, text, dom, and all. See also: operator.

glossentry.domains: (topic concept) (topic concept glossentry) (topic concept glossgroup) a(props deliveryTarget) (topic equation-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic markup-d) (topic mathml-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic svg-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)
glossentry.glossdef: A YAML metadata block at the top of a Markdown file, delimited by --- lines. Front matter contains structured metadata such as title, ms.topic, ms.date, and description. markdown-validator requires every file to have a front-matter block.

glossentry.domains: (topic concept) (topic concept glossentry) (topic concept glossgroup) a(props deliveryTarget) (topic equation-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic markup-d) (topic mathml-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic svg-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)
glossentry.glossdef: A validation rule that checks the YAML front-matter metadata at the top of a Markdown file. Header rules use a metadata key name as their query field. Contrast with body rule.

glossentry.domains: (topic concept) (topic concept glossentry) (topic concept glossgroup) a(props deliveryTarget) (topic equation-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic markup-d) (topic mathml-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic svg-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)
glossentry.glossdef: A plain-English remediation message shown to an author when a rule fails. Defined in the rule's mitigation field. A good mitigation message is an imperative sentence that tells the author exactly what to change.

glossentry.domains: (topic concept) (topic concept glossentry) (topic concept glossgroup) a(props deliveryTarget) (topic equation-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic markup-d) (topic mathml-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic svg-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)
glossentry.glossdef: A comparison function applied between the processed query result and the expected value in a rule. Operators include equality (==), inequality (!=), contains ([]), starts-with ([:), regex match (r), and length limit (l). See also: flag.

glossentry.domains: (topic concept) (topic concept glossentry) (topic concept glossgroup) a(props deliveryTarget) (topic equation-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic markup-d) (topic mathml-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic svg-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)
glossentry.glossdef: An error raised when markdown-validator cannot read a .md file because it does not begin with a valid YAML front-matter block. A file that produces a ParseError is counted as a failed scan and contributes to the exit code of 1.

glossentry.domains: (topic concept) (topic concept glossentry) (topic concept glossgroup) a(props deliveryTarget) (topic equation-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic markup-d) (topic mathml-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic svg-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)
glossentry.glossdef: Read–Eval–Print Loop. An interactive command-line session started with md-validate repl. The REPL lets rule creators load a Markdown file, inspect its structure, test XPath expressions, and evaluate rule JSON objects before committing rules to a rule set file.

glossentry.domains: (topic concept) (topic concept glossentry) (topic concept glossgroup) a(props deliveryTarget) (topic equation-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic markup-d) (topic mathml-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic svg-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)
glossentry.glossdef: A JSON object that defines a single assertion about a Markdown document. A rule specifies what to query (query), how to process the result (flag), how to compare it (operation), and what the expected value is (value). Rules have a severity level (Required or Suggested) and a mitigation message.

glossentry.domains: (topic concept) (topic concept glossentry) (topic concept glossgroup) a(props deliveryTarget) (topic equation-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic markup-d) (topic mathml-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic svg-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)
glossentry.glossdef: A JSON file that defines all the validation rules and workflows for a specific content type. A rule set has three top-level elements: rules.header, rules.body, and workflows. Rule set files are version-controlled in the documentation repository and used by both local validation and CI.

glossentry.domains: (topic concept) (topic concept glossentry) (topic concept glossgroup) a(props deliveryTarget) (topic equation-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic markup-d) (topic mathml-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic svg-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)
glossentry.glossdef: The output produced by validating one Markdown file against a rule set. A scan report includes a score (passing rules / total rules), a per-rule pass/fail result, and mitigation messages for each failure. Available in text, JSON, and CSV formats.

glossentry.domains: (topic concept) (topic concept glossentry) (topic concept glossgroup) a(props deliveryTarget) (topic equation-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic markup-d) (topic mathml-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic svg-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)
glossentry.glossdef: The number of rules that passed divided by the total number of rules evaluated, expressed as a fraction (for example, 24/26). A score of 26/26 means every rule passed. The score does not directly determine the CI exit code — only the pass/fail status of Required rules does.

glossentry.domains: (topic concept) (topic concept glossentry) (topic concept glossgroup) a(props deliveryTarget) (topic equation-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic markup-d) (topic mathml-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic svg-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)
glossentry.glossdef: A rule severity level that indicates a best-practice recommendation. Suggested-level failures are reported but do not affect the CLI exit code. A CI pipeline step passes even if Suggested rules fail. Contrast with Required.

glossentry.domains: (topic concept) (topic concept glossentry) (topic concept glossgroup) a(props deliveryTarget) (topic equation-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic markup-d) (topic mathml-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic svg-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)
glossentry.glossdef: A rule severity level that indicates a mandatory editorial standard. Required-level failures set the CLI exit code to 1, causing a CI pipeline step to fail and blocking the merge. The default level if level is omitted from a rule. Contrast with Suggested.

glossentry.domains: (topic concept) (topic concept glossentry) (topic concept glossgroup) a(props deliveryTarget) (topic equation-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic markup-d) (topic mathml-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic svg-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)
glossentry.glossdef: A named sequence of rule evaluation steps that uses conditional branching. Workflows allow a check to run only when a precondition is met. Defined in the workflows array of a rule set file using the workflow step language.

glossentry.domains: (topic concept) (topic concept glossentry) (topic concept glossgroup) a(props deliveryTarget) (topic equation-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic markup-d) (topic mathml-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic svg-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)
glossentry.glossdef: XML Path Language. A query language for selecting nodes in an XML or HTML document. markdown-validator body rules use XPath 1.0 expressions to query the rendered HTML of a Markdown file's body. The HTML is flat: all headings are direct children of <body>.
